text: The surgeon performs a horizontal incision through the scar tissue, extending up to the dentate line. A skin flap is drawn, ensuring that the blood supply to the flap is not compromised during preparation.

The surgeon stitches the skin flap to the anus using three interrupted ovicryl sutures, closing the skin defect with the same type of sutures. The post-operative measurement of the anal opening is approximately twenty millimeters.
